AboutFeaturesPreviewContact

Create, Assign, Track. Done.

Admins create and assign tasks to any user. Team members update status as work progresses - no emails, no guesswork.

See it Live Get in Touch

One hub.
Zero workplace chaos.

Nextrack brings role-based access, priority task boards, and real-time communication into a single secure platform designed for teams that need to stay highly organized.

Total Security

Every employee must be verified by an admin before accessing the workspace, ensuring complete data integrity from day one.

Seamless Teamwork

Assign tasks to individuals or entire roles and collaborate instantly using the built-in live chat within a unified interface.

Laser Focus

Cut noise by categorising tasks by priority. Your team always knows what deserves attention right now.

Everything your team
needs to ship faster.

Hover each card to see what's inside.

Admin Approvals

Only verified employees get in.

Hover to learn more →

Admin Approvals

A secure verification flow ensures only approved employees access your workspace. Reject or approve incoming registrations with a single click while maintaining a complete audit trail.

Dynamic Roles

Permissions that match your org.

Hover to learn more →

Dynamic Roles

Create custom roles like Manager or Editor and assign specific permissions across your entire organization. Changes take effect immediately without requiring users to log in again.

Priority Tasking

High, Medium, and Low priorities made clear.

Hover to learn more →

Priority Tasking

Filter and manage tasks by priority tier to keep your team focused on what moves the needle. Smart ordering surfaces the most critical work at the top.

See Nextrack
in action.

Your Task Board at a Glance

Every task assigned to you, right on the dashboard. Filter by status, see priorities, and know exactly what needs your attention today.
